name: IT Onice
events: 20 Jan 1945 Onice departed Bermuda for New London, Connecticut, USA.
23 Jan 1945 Onice arrived at New London, Connecticut from Bermuda.
10 Mar 1945 Onice departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
11 Mar 1945 Onice arrived at Casco Bay, Maine.
13 May 1945 Onice departed Casco Bay, Maine, USA for the Portsmouth Navy Yard for a scheduled overhaul.
